// 01 — ABOUT

The person
behind the screen

I'm a senior creative developer obsessed with the intersection of motion, interaction design, and performant engineering. I craft digital experiences that aren't just functional — they're felt.

5+ years building at the edge of what browsers can do. Currently open to select engagements.
